summary: Tested iteration 56 feature: 'Payé' button for paiement category expenses. All features working correctly - button appears ONLY for expenses with category='paiement' and status='approved'. Toggle functionality works correctly for both Admin and Gérante roles.
critical_code_review_comments: AchatsTab.jsx lines 902-928: Payé button correctly conditional on expense.category === 'paiement' AND (currentUser?.role === 'manager' || currentUser?.role === 'admin')
AchatsTab.jsx lines 854-858: '💰 Payé' badge correctly displays when expense.category === 'paiement' && expense.is_paid
AchatsTab.jsx: Button styling correctly changes to amber background (bg-amber-600) when is_paid=true
AchatsTab.jsx: Toggle functionality correctly sends is_paid, paid_at (ISO), paid_by to updateExpense()
Backend expenses.py lines 169-171: ExpenseUpdate model correctly includes is_paid, paid_at, paid_by fields
Backend expenses.py lines 294-319: PUT endpoint correctly persists is_paid, paid_at, paid_by fields
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test expenses: 1 with category='paiement' (TEST - Loyer mensuel Avril 2026, ID: ededb057-5ead-47b4-862d-fcbecee6b0af) and 1 with category='cuisine' (TEST - Légumes frais, ID: 333f36a3-b26d-46c9-84cc-3dabf2dba063). Both approved for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 added a 'Payé' button (Wallet icon) that appears ONLY for approved expenses with category='paiement'. The button is visible to both Admin and Manager (Gérante) roles. When clicked, it shows a confirmation dialog, then sends PUT /api/expenses/{id} with is_paid=true, paid_at (ISO timestamp), paid_by (username/role). Once paid, a '💰 Payé' badge appears next to the description and the button changes to 'Payé ✓' with amber background. Clicking again toggles is_paid=false. Test expenses created: paiement (ededb057...) and cuisine (333f36a3...).

frontend: Payé button (Wallet icon) appears ONLY for expenses with category='paiement' and status='approved'
Payé button does NOT appear for expenses with category='cuisine', 'bar', or 'autres'
Payé button visible for Admin role - VERIFIED
Payé button visible for Manager (Gérante) role - VERIFIED
Clicking Payé shows confirmation dialog with expense description and amount
After confirmation, button changes to 'Payé ✓' with amber background (bg-amber-600)
'💰 Payé' badge appears next to expense description when is_paid=true
Clicking 'Payé ✓' again shows confirmation to toggle off
After toggle off, badge disappears and button returns to 'Payé' (outline style)
Toast notification 'Dépense mise à jour !' confirms API call success
backend: PUT /api/expenses/{id} accepts is_paid, paid_at, paid_by fields
GET /api/expenses?category=paiement returns expenses with is_paid/paid_at/paid_by fields

Verify Payé button appears for paiement expense - SUCCESS
Verify Payé button does NOT appear for cuisine expense - SUCCESS
Click Payé button, accept confirmation - SUCCESS
Verify button changes to 'Payé ✓' with amber background - SUCCESS
Click 'Payé ✓' to toggle off, accept confirmation - SUCCESS
Navigate to Achats & Dépenses tab - SUCCESS
Verify Payé button visible for Gérante - SUCCESS
Verify Payé button NOT visible for cuisine expense - SUCCESS
